text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro McQueen and I are on set for a
popular TV show.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text: Here's today's guest for Running in Style.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My name is... Mejiro McQueen. Thank you for
having me on the show.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
You can't speak the name Mejiro without
recognizing its prestige! Our episode with the
venerable head of your family broke viewership
records!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Fans enjoyed the rare opportunity to see a
different side of her. We're all excited to be
talking to you today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! As a proud member of the Mejiro family, I
shall do my best to live up to your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must provide my answers with thought and care
befitting the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen seems more stiff than usual as
the filming proceeds...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-in short! I must fulfill the dearest... dearest wish
of... the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
I-is that right? Powerful words indeed. I can
really... feel the spirit behind them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes! I want to show... N-no, I shall show... everyone that I am ready to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... It's no use. These sorts of answers don't do
justice to the dignity of the Mejiro name...

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Why don't we take a break? I'm sure you
could use a little bit of a refresher right about
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... My apologies.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no need to apologize! We've got you on for
quite the lengthy session, after all. Please, take
some time to recharge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This isn't going well. I thought I was used to being on camera by now, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-is that so? Yes... you're probably right.
However, I can't rid myself of these thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This outfit is a sign of my resolve and my duty. I
want to demonstrate that to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides... I'm doing this for the fans who are
cheering me on. I must conduct myself in a
manner befitting the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I think of all this, well... my words
seem to get stuck in my throat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's gotten herself all worked up. At this point,
the best thing to do is to help her relax.
choice_data_list: Why don't you go for a quick run?
Why don't you eat something sweet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! This may be a break, but we're still
filming! My hair would get all disheveled!
choice_data_list: There'll be time to fix it! C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! G-good grief...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... How strange. It felt as though both my
body and mind were shedding weight as I ran.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I captured your run just now! I'd love to put
it on the air if possible. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! B-but... My hair is all disheveled, and... I'm
sure I looked terrible.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Consider it a request from me too! I could really
feel your passion for running while I watched!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes... please put it on the air. If it conveys my
passion, then nothing would make me happier!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, Mejiro McQueen's invigorating run
garners a huge response from viewers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: S-something sweet?! Unthinkable!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is an important shoot, so I must be perfect!
Allowing myself to be distracted by a snack would
be—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-all right, fine! They say sweets serve well as a
pick-me-up, so... Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Ahh... The macaron is melting in my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, delicious. Both my body and mind feel
more relaxed now.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What a natural, beautiful smile! I'd love to
put that on the air, if you wouldn't mind. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha?! M-my expression just now?!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Consider it a request from me, too! I'm sure it'll
make your fans happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Very well, then! I shall allow it, for the sake of
my fans!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, um... I-it's rather embarrassing. Would
you please only air a short clip?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, the sight of Mejiro McQueen enjoying
sweets garners a huge response from viewers.
